title: Spider-Man: Far from Home
desc: A shy teenager, imbued with spider-like abilities after a bite, becomes a masked superhero battling injustice and confronting a vengeful foe in a thrilling conflict.

title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
desc: A town sheriff has to find a way to kill a gigantic crocodile and anaconda before they destroy the whole town.

title: Resident Evil
desc: A military unit fights a powerful, out-of-control supercomputer and scientists who have mutated into flesh-eating creatures.

title: Terminator 3: Rise Of The Machines
desc: The most advanced Terminator unit ever arrives to ensure the rise of the machines. It is up to the T-850 to avert this calamity.

title: Zombieland: Double Tap
desc: Columbus, Tallahassee, Wichita, and Little Rock move to the American heartland as they face off against evolved zombies, fellow survivors, and the growing pains of the snarky makeshift family.

title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
desc: The original Ghostbusters reunite with a new team to battle a powerful, death-chilling god threatening the world.

title: The Retirement Plan
desc: Ashley's ties with the wrong people endanger her family, prompting her to seek help from her estranged father, who lives a quiet retired life in the Cayman Islands.

title: The Equalizer

title: Never Back Down 2: The Beatdown
desc: Four fighters with different backgrounds come together to train under an ex-MMA and ultimately have to fight each other.
